source_text: Definition relies on Ownership.
group_label: Definition of public entity relies on ownership

source_text: Definition relies on Structure or composition of revenue.
group_label: Definition of public entity relies on revenue structure/composition

source_text: Definition relies on Public charter or special government protection.
group_label: Definition of public entity relies on public charter or government protection

source_text: Are principals required to disclose?

source_text: Are lobbyists required to disclose?
